title: justicia cuneata subsp. hoerleiniana
intro: Justicia cuneata subsp. hoerleiniana, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or hoerlein's justicia, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, native to Mexico. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia cuneata subsp. hoerleiniana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
